plugins.name: mcp-gateway
plugins.description: MCP package manager substrate for Claude Code. Ships mcp-gateway (npm @mikkoparkkola/mcp-gateway) as the single MCP server entry. Canonical pin-versioned backends (110+ capabilities) delivered via the gateway's config bundle (examples/gateway-full.yaml, examples/config-bundles.yaml). Enables downstream plugins (nab, hebb, pithy, symphony, trvl) to depend on gateway.
plugins.author: Mikko Parkkola
